items.title: Coming soon: Alex Batty vanished at 11 - now he tells his story
items.summary: At 11 years old, Alex thought he was going on holiday. Instead, he vanished for six years.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Pakistan ask Bangladesh to bat; both XIs packed with quicks
items.summary: Nahid Rana, Ebadot Hossain and Taskin Ahmed are the quicks for Bangladesh, while Shaheen Afridi, Hasan Ali and Mohammad Abbas will do the job for Pakistan
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Magnus Carlsen lords over Yagiz Kaan, Arjun Erigaisi for another elite title
items.summary: Magnus Carlsen clinched the TePe Sigeman & Co. chess title in Malmo after a dramatic classical win against Yagiz Kaan and two decisive blitz victories over Arjun Erigaisi. Carls...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
